name: Request for New Text
about: Request adding a text to the Open Canon library
title: "[TEXT REQUEST] "
labels: text-request
assignees: ''
---

## Text Request

**Name of the work**
<!-- The full, formal title of the work -->

**Conventional name**
<!-- The name by which the work is commonly known or cited -->

**Provenance**
<!-- The origin, authorship, and history of the work (e.g., author, tradition, community of origin) -->

**Dates published (and where)**
<!-- When and where the work was first published, and any significant subsequent editions -->

**Online source for the text**
<!-- A URL or reference to a freely accessible online version of the text -->

**Description**
<!-- A brief description of the work and why it should be included in the Open Canon library -->
